author: My Ky Quan
description: Import Kindle highlights and notes from a local My Clippings.txt file into Markdown notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: My Ky Quan
manifest.description: Import Kindle highlights and notes from a local My Clippings.txt file into Markdown notes.
manifest.name: Kindle Local Sync

## What's Changed

* Feature/kindle detector by @mykyquan in https://github.com/mykyquan/kindle-local-sync/pull/3
* test: harden vault writer sync behavior by @mykyquan in https://github.com/mykyquan/kindle-local-sync/pull/4
* docs: polish multilingual README and install docs by @mykyquan in https://github.com/mykyquan/kindle-local-sync/pull/5
* docs: polish multilingual README and install docs by @mykyquan in https://github.com/mykyquan/kindle-local-sync/pull/6
* chore: add release packaging automation by @mykyquan in https://github.com/mykyquan/kindle-local-sync/pull/7

## New Contributors
